description: Safari extensions parser reads Extensions/Extensions.plist and emits BrowserEvent per extension
steps: Use plist crate to read the file
The plist is a dict with 'Installed Extensions' key containing an array of extension dicts
Each dict has: 'Bundle Directory Name' (string), 'Enabled' (bool), 'Archive File Name' (string)
Use 0 as timestamp (no install date in plist). Set browser=Safari, artifact=Extensions
Description: bundle directory name. Attrs: bundle_name, enabled
Test factory writes a test plist with plist crate to NamedTempFile
Test: parse_empty_extensions_plist — Installed Extensions array empty yields empty vec
Test: parse_single_safari_extension — attrs[bundle_name] and attrs[enabled] correct
